name: Optional Python Security Scan
on:
  push:
    branches: [ "main" ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ "main" ]

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: python-scan-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  python-scan:
    name: "Python Compliance & Security"
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@692973e3d937129bcbf40652eb9f2f61becf3332 # v4.1.7

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@39585653287db0910e547285f096ae258b389ee2 # v4.7.1
        with:
          python-version: '3.10'

      - name: Security Scan (Python Dependencies)
        run: |
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
            pip install safety
            safety check -r requirements.txt || echo "::warning:: Vulnerable dependencies detected in requirements.txt"
          else
            echo "No requirements.txt found. Skipping scan."
          fi

      - name: Python Syntax Check
        run: |
          PY_FILES=$(find . -name "*.py" -not -path "*/.*")
          if [ -n "$PY_FILES" ]; then
            python3 -m py_compile $PY_FILES
          else
            echo "No python files found. Skipping syntax check."
          fi
